summary: Please run the e2e test `tests/e2e/accuracy/test_hunyuan_image3.py::test_image_to_image_alignment_online` to validate the orchestrator dispatch path end-to-end, or add a regression test that exercises that path.
Update the docstring of `requires_multimodal_data` to state that it is reserved for interface compatibility and multimodal data is always forwarded.
Add an assertion `assert len(source_outputs) >= 1` after the empty guard to enforce that the parent output is always first.
Remove the hardcoded `'Request 0:'` prefix from the log string since the function now processes exactly one request.
